excerpt: God's pleasure bears the name of worship, and Paradise itself is but another name for the pleasure of God
source_location_hint: discussion of exoteric observance versus esoteric intention

excerpt: the shoulder of the Prophet served as pulpit; for your esteemed name, the stretches of the Throne became gems adorning the divine ring
source_location_hint: imagery of cosmic rank attendant upon the Imam

excerpt: as far as his feet advance, so shall my forehead follow in prostration—symbol of Duldúl and measure of spiritual submission
source_location_hint: on the hierarchy of spiritual attachment to the Imams
